top3.sql:
SELECT e.expense_description, e.approved
FROM expense e
JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id
WHERE ev.event_name = 'October Meeting'
  AND ev.event_date = '2019-10-08';

SELECT expense.expense_id, expense.expense_description, expense.approved
FROM expense
JOIN budget ON expense.link_to_budget = budget.budget_id
JOIN event ON budget.link_to_event = event.event_id
WHERE event.event_name = 'October Meeting' 
  AND event.event_date = '2019-10-08';

final.sql:
SELECT e.expense_description, e.approved
FROM expense e
JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id
WHERE ev.event_name = 'October Meeting'
  AND ev.event_date = '2019-10-08';
